context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the gantt-release-plan scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Uses Gantt syntax
checklist.description: Uses Mermaid gantt syntax rather than a flowchart or timeline.

checklist.name: Includes schedule essentials
checklist.description: Includes the project start date, design review, implementation, QA, documentation, and release milestone.

checklist.name: Models dependencies
checklist.description: Shows implementation after design review, QA after implementation, documentation after implementation, and release after both QA and documentation are complete or clearly notes the limiting dependency.

checklist.name: Uses readable organization
checklist.description: Uses sections, concise task labels, and Mermaid-friendly dates/durations.

checklist.name: Assumptions note
checklist.description: Includes one short assumptions sentence outside the diagram.
